terms.context_quote: position-waves {wave packets}—localized waves that spread out in space
terms.usefulness: Helps visualize particles as waves with spatial localization
terms.risk: Could imply particles are literally waves, but clarifies they're wave descriptions

terms.context_quote: a narrow position-wave {wave packet} (localized in space) has a broad momentum-spread {momentum uncertainty}
terms.usefulness: Makes the concept of momentum uncertainty more intuitive as a spread
terms.risk: Suggests momentum is a spread rather than a precise value

terms.usefulness: Links wave structure to mathematical analysis of waveforms
terms.risk: Could be confused with other types of structural analysis
